text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking around school one day,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding dong, ding dong!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Next!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's me! Number 7, Kitasan Black!<n>Smiles or
sorrow, I can sing it all. For<n>my song, I've
chosen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, we still have more people wanting<n>to audition?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Umamusume or human,<n>these song
samples will help me<n>analyze empathic
understanding all<n>the same.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We'll hear what your voice has to<n>offer after her,
then!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Please, back of the line. It's her turn.<n>Number 7,
you may begin.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, I've gotten roped into<n>singing for
science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Number 18, take the stage, please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, I'm dragged out in front of the<n>mic. I guess
I just have to give it my<n>best shot...
choice_data_list: Let it rip! Give voice to passion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I dig up a lullaby from old memories<n>and sing
along as best as I can<n>remember.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A lullaby? Really now?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, this melody sure takes me<n>back. But
who's the one singing?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yawn... What a nice song... I'mgetting sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sun's warm rays, along with my<n>singing,
bring a sleepy end to the<n>audition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well... maybe this could be one way<n>to help
<chrname> relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get into the groove and belt out a<n>melody,
shaking my head up and<n>down to the beat!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! I can feel the passion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? And this passion... what kind of<n>feeling is it,
exactly?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hearing all this shouting and<n>screaming, it's like...
like a fire's<n>been lit in my soul!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: YEAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Excellent! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: They're multiplying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next thing I know, the stage is<n>swarming with
students.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Come on, everybody! Let's get fired<n>up!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Sing from the soul! Passion!<n>Passion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Could this be some sort of resonance
phenomenon? No...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Passion! Passion! Passion! Passion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...No, that's not it. What in the name of<n>science is
this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I now have a deeper understanding<n>of what
passion truly is. I should<n>relate my findings to
<chrname>.
